title: potentilla reptans subpedata
intro: Potentilla reptans subpedata, also known as the cinquefoil or creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla reptans subpedata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
